title: Security Attack Source IP Analysis
description: Top attacking IPs across both applications with attack type distribution and severity breakdown. Enables IP-based threat intelligence correlation and firewall rule recommendations.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Attack Type' != null | stats count as Attacks, distinctcount('Attack Type') as UniqueAttackTypes, unique('Attack Type') as AttackTypes, distinctcount('Service Name') as TargetedServices by 'Client IP' | sort -Attacks | head 25
